title: Add toggle for Docker install/deinstall for baseline test
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a -d switch to the test_podman_baseline.sh script.  When used, the script will NOT install nor remove Docker from the test machine.
